retry_reason: If the pointer is NULL, retrying would still be a no-op; if non-NULL, the put never fails and the pointer becomes invalid after, so retry is pointless.
contract_summary: This is a put wrapper that releases a reference on a struct batadv_hard_iface by decrementing its kref refcount via kref_put. If the refcount reaches zero, the release callback batadv_hardif_release is invoked to free the object. The caller must not use the hard_iface pointer after calling this function, as the object may be freed. The function safely handles NULL pointers by returning immediately. No additional locks or RCU protection are required by this wrapper; the caller is simply releasing its own reference.
